### `snapModelToHarness`

`function` — Keeps `modelId` when the harness can run it; otherwise returns the harness's best compatible model from the loaded catalog (preferred patterns in order, highest version within a pattern).

```ts
(harness: HarnessType, modelId: string, models: readonly ModelInfo[]) => string
```
